channel.title: My Journey in Tech
channel.itunes:subtitle: From Student to Software Professional
channel.itunes:author: Sonu Pal
channel.description: My journey of learning, building projects, overcoming challenges, and preparing for a successful career in the IT industry.

item.title: EP01-Where My Journey Began
item.itunes:author: Sonu Pal
item.description: I started my B.Tech in Information Technology with a passion for technology and a dream of building a successful career in software development and data analytics.

item.title: EP02-Learning and Building Skills
item.itunes:author: Sonu Pal
item.description: I learned Python, Java, SQL, Power BI, FastAPI, React, Git, and database management while working on practical projects and strengthening my technical foundation.

item.title: EP03-Projects That Shaped Me
item.itunes:author: Sonu Pal
item.description: I developed AI-powered applications, automation tools, analytics dashboards, and full-stack projects that improved my problem-solving skills and gave me hands-on industry experience.

item.title: EP04-Challenges and Growth
item.itunes:author: Sonu Pal
item.description: Like many fresh graduates, I faced interview rejections, communication challenges, and self-doubt. Instead of giving up, I focused on improving every day through practice, learning, and consistency.

item.title: EP05-The Road Ahead
item.itunes:author: Sonu Pal
item.description: My goal is to begin my career as a Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Backend Developer, DevOps Engineer, or Data Analyst, contribute to impactful products, continuously learn new technologies, and grow into a skilled technology professional.
